title: Hall of Kings
description: Royal psalms, coronation hymns, and court poetry from the Davidic dynasty.

title: Prophets Gallery
description: Crisis texts, political signs, and prophetic oracles rooted in specific historical moments.

title: Exile Records
description: National memory, deportation laments, and symbolic visions of restoration.

title: Interpretation Wing
description: Where original contexts meet later reuses. The pattern reveals itself here.

title: Hall of Expectations
description: What the prophets actually required of the messiah — and whether any of it came to pass.
